verses.text: Keimah Paul, leh Silas, leh Timoti-te in—- Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih sungah a om, Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpimite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi
Pa Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih in note tungah dikna leh nopsakna thupha hong tungsak ta hen.

Sanggamte aw, note' upna nakpi takin khang a, note khatlekhat na ki-itna uh lian semsem ahih manin Pasian tungah lungdamna kohding a kilawm ahih mah bangin, note hangin ama tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi
Bawlsiatna leh gimna na thuakna khempeuh uhah na upna uh khahsuah loin thuakzo paisuak na hih manun midangte kiangah Pasian' pawlpi ka na kisialhpih uh hi
Tu-a na thuaknate uh hangin Pasian' Ukna sungah a om dingin a kilawm mi suak na hih manun Pasian' thukhenna a man ahihna hong kilangsak hi
Pasian in a manin na sem ding ahih manin note a hong gimsak mite tungah Pasian in gimna pia ding a
tu-a gimna a thuak note leh kote tungah zong nopsakna hong pia ding hi. Vantung panin Topa Jesuh leh a vanglian a vantung mite, meikuang tawh hong kilat ciangin
Pasian a theilo mite, leh i Topa Jesuh tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu a umlo mite tungah gimna a tungsak ding hi

Ama mite khempeuh leh thu um mite khempeuh hangin minthan'na leh pahtawina a ngah dingin Topa hong pai Ni ciangin a noptuak mahmah Topa' minthan'na huamsung panin amaute kihawlkhia ding a, tawntung suksiatna dan a thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note in ka hong gen uh thute um na hih manun tua nopna sungah na om ding uh hi

Tua ahih manin ama hong sapna tawh a kilawm a kituak nuntakna na nuntak theihna ding uh leh ama vangliatna tawh a hoih na hihnop khempeuh uh hihzo-in, na upna uh hangin na khempeuh na zawhtheihna dingun Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak tawntung uh hi
Tua hi leh, eite' Pa Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna hangin note in ama tung panin minthan'na ngahin, ama min zong a thangsak na hi ding uh hi.
